meta.title: Timeline Prompting in Sora 2 is CRAZY for Cinematic AI Videos
meta.description:
Sora 2 is an insane AI video generator for timeline prompting
Try Sora on Artlist 👉 https://artlist.io/artlist-70446/?artlist_aid=DanKieft_3875&utm_source=affiliate_p&utm_medium=DanKieft_3875&utm_campaign=DanKieft_3875

In this video I use timeline prompting in the Sora 2 ai video generator to make cinematic ai videos. This method allows us to be highly detailed about adding exactly what you want to have happen in the scene. Sora 2 is great for following up your prompt, and it perfectly understands the timecodes you add in there.

Shout-out to @SirioBerati for breaking down this method

My custom GPT
https://chatgpt.com/g/g-68f286c0794c81919b00d94dc8f54711-timeline-prompter

👉My Ai Toolkit - https://dankieft.carrd.co/
